creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tomoaki AOKI from comment #11)
> git main df38ada2931f is now MFC'ed to stable/13 as git stable/13
> a34668185ba7, and OSVERSION check is now become harmful.
Hmm, you're right and we should remove it as it turned out to be overzealous; it was not very accurate anyway.  I'll commit once my all tinderbox runs pass.
